name: @dekimuhq/dekimu-mcp
description: Verifiable-AI MCP server: mint and verify offline action receipts, run reproducible GDPR checks. Local-first, no telemetry.

scripts.check:no-private-dep: ! grep -rEq "^(import|export).*from.*@dekimuhq/|require\(@dekimuhq/" src/ || (echo 'ERROR: private @dekimuhq import found' && exit 1)
